name: MiniMax-M2
archDisplay: 62-layer decoder-only Transformer, 256 experts (top-8, sigmoid gating) + Multi-Token Prediction module, full GQA attention
note: Compact 229.9B-total/9.8B-active MoE tuned for coding and agentic workflows with interleaved <think> reasoning; original M2 release is MIT-licensed (later M2.x point releases, e.g. M2.1/M2.7, moved to a restrictive 'Modified-MIT').
tpsNote: Unsloth's UD-IQ4_XS dynamic GGUF (~108GB) is reported at ~15-25 tok/s on a single 16GB GPU + 96GB system RAM or Mac unified memory - no RTX-4090-specific figure found.
